name: usage-trace
description: Trace keyword usage, call chains, and database tables in Java/Spring, Python, or C# with an offline HTML report. Supports Chinese queries: 查找字段使用情况, 追踪调用链, 字段流向.

interface.shortDescription: Trace field usage, call chains, and DB tables (查找字段使用情况、调用链追踪).
interface.longDescription: Analyze a Java/Spring, Python (SQLAlchemy), or C# (EF Core) project for a keyword such as orderId or store_no, then generate a single offline HTML report with usage sites, call chain, and database table access. 支持中文查询：查找字段使用情况、追踪调用链、字段流向分析。
defaultPrompt: Analyze storeNo usage in the current Java project.
Trace a Java field and summarize touched database tables.
查找 orderId 字段项目使用情况
追踪 storeNo 的调用链和涉及的数据库表
Analyze store_no usage in this Python SQLAlchemy project.
Trace storeNo in this C# EF Core project and list tables.
